map: A thick SWAMP/MARSH biome ('the Refuge') — water, reeds, magical swamp inhabitants. Inspired by the legacy ROTF 'Riverborn' realm event.

bosses.name: Riverborn, Lord of the Refuge
phases: wading approach (find his home waters in the realm)
DIVE phase — submerges, stalks players underwater, then surfaces under a player for a burst
attacks: DIVING (goes underwater, stalks, pops up to hit)
minions: River Striders / Lurkers (aka 'Living Brushes' — impostor creatures)
River Serpent ('Flying Snake') — fires tricky BUBBLE projectiles
bosses.note: A 'Lord' — like other RotF Lords, players explore the realm to find his home waters to challenge him (realm-spawned boss).

mechanics: DOCUMENTED (dev blog): Riverside Refuge is a Medium-rank swamp dungeon/realm-Lord area. Boss = RIVERBORN (giant water-dragon-snake, returning from legacy). Signature mechanics: wind torrents, spinning, and DIVING (submerge → stalk underwater → surface-strike). 'Lord' bosses are found by exploring the realm for their home waters (same pattern as other RotF Lords incl. Lord of the Lost Lands). Designer Foucs also did Asgard + the Gelatinous Palace.
uncertain: Exact bullet patterns/HP/drops not specified. Raw text: docs/aced-blog/riverborn-riverside.txt.
confidence: MEDIUM-HIGH for biome + boss mechanics + minion roster (DOCUMENTED); LOW for stats/drops.
